name: Twitter / X
description: Read your Twitter/X timeline, search tweets and hashtags, post tweets, reply, like, retweet, and monitor keywords automatically. Requires Twitter API v2 credentials configured in the APIs page.

schedules.name: twitter-keyword-watch
schedules.description: Every 30 minutes: fetches new tweets for all monitored keywords and stores them.

examples: Post a tweet saying 'Hello from Gumm!'
What's new on the keywords I'm monitoring?

commands.name: twitter
commands.shortDescription: Show your Twitter/X timeline and recent mentions
commands.description: Use the twitter_timeline tool to fetch the latest tweets from the home timeline. Also call twitter_mentions to check for recent mentions or replies. Present a concise digest: top 5 timeline tweets and any mentions needing attention. Flag any viral or highly engaged tweets.

commands.name: tweet
commands.description: Use the text provided after the /tweet command as the tweet content. If no text is provided, ask the user what they want to tweet. Check the character count (max 280). Use the twitter_post tool to publish. Confirm with the tweet URL after successful posting.
